title: Windows Event Log Cleared
description: Detects clearing of the Windows Security/System event log (1102/104), a common anti-forensics action.
author: SOC Team
aql: SELECT LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) AS host, username AS cleared_by, sourceip AS src_ip, DATEFORMAT(starttime, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS cleared_time, UTF8(payload) AS raw_event FROM events WHERE UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%AgentDevice=WindowsLog%' AND ( UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=1102%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=104%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%audit log was cleared%' ) ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 10 MINUTES
